popularStory.headline: William 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar
popularStory.description:
William, 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar, 1327?–1384, Scottish nobleman; nephew of Sir James de Douglas, lord of Douglas. 

About 1348 he returned to Scotland from France and recaptured the Douglas lands …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar於大約1323年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯時，他的父親Archibald Douglas27歲，母親Lady Beatrice de Lindsay39歲。他去世於大約1384年5月1日在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾梅露絲。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar was born about 1323, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Archibald Douglas, was 27 and his mother, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, was 39. He died about 1 May 1384, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Melrose, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar est né environ 1323, à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Archibald Douglas, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, avait 39 ans. Il est décédé environ 1 mai 1384, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Melrose, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar um 1323 in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Archibald Douglas 27 und seine Mutter Lady Beatrice de Lindsay 39. Er starb um 1. Mai 1384 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Melrose, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar è nato il circa 1323 nel Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Archibald Douglas, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, aveva 39 anni. Morì circa 1 maggio 1384, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Melrose, Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar(이)가 대략 1323년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Archibald Douglas(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Beatrice de Lindsay(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1384년 5월 1일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 멜로즈에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Douglas 1st Earl of Douglas and Mar родился около 1323 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Archibald Douglas было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Beatrice de Lindsay, 39. Он умер около 1 мая 1384 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности мелрос, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
